entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume produced for oil and food, central to the economy of West Africa

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: A region where groundnut production, marketing, and trade are major sources of employment and income

entities.name: SENEGAL
entities.description: A West African country where groundnut generates 60% of rural cash income

entities.name: GAMBIA
entities.description: A West African country where groundnut generates 60% of rural cash income

entities.name: YIELDS
entities.description: The amount of groundnut produced per unit area, a focus of research and development

entities.name: STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of groundnut varieties to withstand abiotic and biotic stresses

entities.name: MARKET DEMAND
entities.description: The desire and ability of consumers to purchase groundnut products, influencing the adoption of new varieties

entities.name: MARKET SURPLUS PRODUCTION
entities.description: Production exceeding domestic needs, providing incentives for adopting new varieties

entities.name: TECHNOLOGY DEVELOPMENT AND DISSEMINATION
entities.description: The process of creating and spreading new agricultural technologies to farmers

entities.name: COMPETITIVENESS
entities.description: The ability of groundnut products to compete in domestic, regional, and international markets

entities.name: GRADES AND STANDARDS
entities.description: Quality requirements for groundnut products that affect market access

entities.name: DOMESTIC POLICIES
entities.description: National regulations and policies that can limit groundnut trade

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: The broader region where groundnut production and trade are promoted

entities.name: GROUNDNUT TRADE
entities.description: The exchange of groundnuts and groundnut products in various markets
